posts.raw_content:
A bunch of retarded children have commandeered our boat and are holding the captain hostage.

In 2016, Trump miraculously saved our boat from sinking. He sailed us around the world, made us rich, and deftly avoided any conflicts besides wrecking a few Somali pirates with the cannons. An enemy tried to assassinate him but he was saved by the grace of God.

Then a mutiny happened, a rigged election was held and our great captain was replaced by a senile retard who left our boat with hundreds of holes. We were up to our waistes in water before Trump heroically returned again and saved our boat.

However now it’s 2026 and our boat is filled with retarded children known as “zoomers.” They have no idea what happened on the boat over the last 10 years, they just showed up and started barking orders like they are the captain.

Everyday we hear that “room prices are too high. I have to share a room with my mom!” Yet they don’t know all the room price increases happened under the previous dotard captain and we have no way of fixing the cost.

Our ship was once near the Persian Gulf. A whirlpool appeared that threatened to sink our entire boat. Trump called to us all, “man your oars! Paddle away from the whirlpool. Man your oars!”

But the children refused. They are an entitled bunch of children and they asked how using oars would lower the price of their room. They said we are focusing too much on Persian Gulf problems. They said if they start paddling, how do they know if they will ever be able to stop. This sounds like a “FOREVER OAR!!!”

So, Trump and the rest of us paddled for them and saved the boat. The entire time the retarded children were yelling in our ears about how Trump was betraying us and we didn’t need to get involved with his “FOREIGN OARS!” They couldn’t prove it, but they all assured us that the oars were made in Israel and this was all part of a masterful scam to increase production for the Oar-Industrial Complex. They had apparently heard this from a retarded black woman and believed it all.

We carried on like this for a few months. Then it became clear we were out of the Persian Coast and wouldn’t need to go back. Still, the retarded children refused to ever help us paddle, promising that we were still in a FOREVER OAR and our captain had betrayed us.

We tried to talk to the sheriff of the boat and told him to throw these retards overboard and banish them from the ship. Everytime we left him a message, he wouldn’t reply. But then we would see him up late at night in the chow hall, laughing hysterically at some boomer humor. We confronted him and told him “banish the retards!” He looked at us, drooling, with the maniacal eyes of a retard, and told us that he was also worried about FOREVER OARS and thought our captain might be a pedophile. He decided instead to throw us off the boat, one by one. 

Eventually, the captain, seeing he was surrounded by nothing but mutinous retards, abandoned the boat and bought a new one. This of course convinced the retards that they were right all along, our captain was a traitor, and they spent the next ten years docked at port, locked in their moms rooms, afraid to ever use the oars. Every time one of them would volunteer to be the new captain and take them out of port, they’d accuse him of being a shill trying to start a new FOREVER OAR.

posts.raw_content:
First of all; a lot of American problems in economy and corporations isn't "late stage capitalism"; it's early stage socialism. We haven't been truly capitalist (commie word for just Laissez Faire free market) society in a long time. But we're more Laissez Faire still than uber communist nations.

Anyways, the communists want to tear Laissez Faire down because sometimes corporations buy things up and things get worse.

This is often the crux of their pain of why the system must be burnt to the ground. 

Uhhh...corportations always come in and make things worse....these rich CEOs yadda yadda yadda.

Even children are told and understand early on that in life, bad things happen and it will not always be a fairy tale. Their utopic thinking is worse than even a child. Do I rant about things getting worse? Yes. Is some of things getting worse due to the free choices that are allowed to be made in a system where people have the freedom to make choices that makes them richer and the consumer just pining for the good old days when the company was better, or in other words, what happened was allowable under "capitalism"? Yes also. 

As much as I like to rant about x, y and z from companies, where they were better 20 years ago, I know that they're not there to cater to my personal tastes. You have to be an uber narcissist to think because a clothing line you liked got discontinued that the entire system is broken and needs to be overthrown. 

And their idea for replacing something that can sometimes lead to unhappiness, is a system that ALWAYS leads to unhappiness.

Because in their childlike thinking, utopia must be achievable. This world must be able to be like a fairytale where everything is happy all the time for all things, and if any system doesn't achieve that, then I must be able to find a system that can achieve that. So Star Trek TNG style communism promises what they want on paper. Again....ON PAPER. 

In reality, you get none of the good things it promises, but in return you get destitution, alcoholism, and death tolls in the millions. 

But I guess it's worth it because "AMC theaters used to give you more popcorn per dollar, but greedy CEO's have made it worse....uhhh late stage capitalism". Yep, totally justified reason to throw away the free market, couldn't agree more. 

Again even children get taught that life is full of unpleasantness, things that used to be better, things you enjoy get taken away, and you have to move on.

That's why I say communists are literally less mature in their thinking and outlook than children.
